final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing advertisement for a premium beauty skincare product (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a luxurious and refined aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the serum bottle as central focal point with rose petals and water droplets surrounding it
Subject: must include a serum bottle with glass body showing pale golden liquid inside
Scene/backdrop: must include a soft pink gradient background
Lighting/mood: needs a soft and natural lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a soft pink and pale gold direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a luxurious surface treatment — exact glass sheen and petal texture is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
